Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -Q "SELECT ReleaseId, Name, SystemType, Year, Quarter FROM tblRelease WHERE SystemType='R4' ORDER BY ReleaseId")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d "LawPortalCPiR10" -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='tblRelease' AND COLUMN_NAME='ReportNotes'")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d "LawPortalCPiR10" -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='tblRelease' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'ReportNotes%'")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d "LawPortalCPiR10" -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN \('tblPatCountryLaw','tblTmkCountryLaw'\) AND COLUMN_NAME='InternalRemarks'")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'tblPatActionParameter'\) BEGIN CREATE TABLE tblPatActionParameter \(ActParamId INT IDENTITY\(1,1\) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_tblPatActionParameter PRIMARY KEY, ActionTypeID INT NOT NULL, ActionDue NVARCHAR\(60\) NOT NULL, Yr INT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblPatActionParameter_Yr DEFAULT 0, Mo INT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblPatActionParameter_Mo DEFAULT 0, Dy INT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblPatActionParameter_Dy DEFAULT 0, Indicator NVARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblPatActionParameter_Indicator DEFAULT 'Reminder', CreatedBy NVARCHAR\(20\) NULL, UpdatedBy NVARCHAR\(20\) NULL, DateCreated DATETIME NULL, LastUpdate DATETIME NULL\); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX UX_tblPatActionParameter ON tblPatActionParameter \(ActionTypeID, ActionDue, Yr, Mo, Dy\); END; IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'tblTmkActionParameter'\) BEGIN CREATE TABLE tblTmkActionParameter \(ActParamId INT IDENTITY\(1,1\) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_tblTmkActionParameter PRIMARY KEY, ActionTypeID INT NOT NULL, ActionDue NVARCHAR\(60\) NOT NULL, Yr INT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblTmkActionParameter_Yr DEFAULT 0, Mo INT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblTmkActionParameter_Mo DEFAULT 0, Dy INT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblTmkActionParameter_Dy DEFAULT 0, Indicator NVARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_tblTmkActionParameter_Indicator DEFAULT 'Reminder', CreatedBy NVARCHAR\(20\) NULL, UpdatedBy NVARCHAR\(20\) NULL, DateCreated DATETIME NULL, LastUpdate DATETIME NULL\); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX UX_tblTmkActionParameter ON tblTmkActionParameter \(ActionTypeID, ActionDue, Yr, Mo, Dy\); END;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME IN \('tblPatActionParameter','tblTmkActionParameter'\);")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT TOP 10 ReleaseId, Name, Year, Quarter, SystemType FROM tblRelease ORDER BY Name DESC;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT mi.Title, mp.Controller, mp.Action, mi.IsEnabled FROM tblCPiMenuItem mi LEFT JOIN tblCPiMenuPage mp ON mi.PageId = mp.Id WHERE mi.Title LIKE '%Release%' OR mp.Controller = 'Release';")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Menu%';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT mi.Title, mp.Controller, mp.Action, mi.IsEnabled FROM tblCPiMenuItems mi LEFT JOIN tblCPiMenuPages mp ON mi.PageId = mp.Id WHERE mi.Title LIKE '%Release%' OR mp.Controller = 'Release';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT sc.Name, sc.ScreenName, sc.LoginName, scd.IsDefault, LEFT\(scd.CriteriaData, 200\) AS CriteriaData FROM tblSearchCriteriaDetails scd INNER JOIN tblSearchCriterias sc ON scd.SearchCriteriaId = sc.SearchCriteriaId WHERE sc.ScreenName LIKE '%release%';")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%Search%';")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN \('tblPatCountryExp','tblPatCountryExpDelete'\) ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "ALTER TABLE tblPatCountryExp ALTER COLUMN Type nvarchar\(60\) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE tblPatCountryExp ALTER COLUMN BasedOn nvarchar\(30\) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE tblPatCountryExp ALTER COLUMN EffBasedOn nvarchar\(30\) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE tblPatCountryExpDelete ALTER COLUMN Type nvarchar\(60\) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE tblPatCountryExpDelete ALTER COLUMN BasedOn nvarchar\(30\) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE tblPatCountryExpDelete ALTER COLUMN EffBasedOn nvarchar\(30\) NOT NULL;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d LawPortalCPiR10 -E -Q "SELECT 'tblPatCountryLaw' AS T, COUNT\(*\) AS Rows FROM tblPatCountryLaw UNION ALL SELECT 'tblPatCountryDue', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblPatCountryDue UNION ALL SELECT 'tblPatCountryExp', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblPatCountryExp UNION ALL SELECT 'tblPatCountryExpDelete', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblPatCountryExpDelete UNION ALL SELECT 'tblTmkCountryLaw', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblTmkCountryLaw UNION ALL SELECT 'tblTmkCountryDue', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblTmkCountryDue;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(local\)" -d ColossalRTPatv21R10 -E -Q "SELECT 'PatAT src' AS T, COUNT\(*\) AS N FROM tblPatActionType UNION ALL SELECT 'PatAP src', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblPatActionParameter UNION ALL SELECT 'TmkAT src', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblTmkActionType UNION ALL SELECT 'TmkAP src', COUNT\(*\) FROM tblTmkActionParameter; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'tblPatActionType' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;")
